number.toobig: The number must be equal to or lower than %max%
multi-input.info: Type in one or multiple values
multi-input.error: Invalid entries will not be saved

string.toolong: The field must contain at must %max% characters
email.invalid: A valid email must be input
phone.invalid: A valid phone number must be input

integer.invalid: A valid integer must be input
groupTags.required: At least one item must be selected
choice.required.max: The selection must not exceed %max% choices
serverException: There was trouble while saving the data, try again in a short while
serverErrorTooLargeFile: The submission failed: a too large image or file was loaded in the form. Maximum allowed size is %max% megabytes
noOrigin: This event is unavailable as it is not associated to any agenda.
pageDoesNotExist: The page you requested does not exist
invalidOrIncompleteEvent: The action was not successful. The event is either incomplete, or invalid. Update it before trying again
changeEmailErrorTitle: The link you clicked on is invalid
changeEmailError:
This can happen for a few reasons:
1. This link was already used and the email change was already validated.
2. Several email changes were submitted sequentially. In that case only the last link sent to your inbox can be valid.
3. You are attempting to open this link from an account different than the one from which the request was initiated.

Contact support if this problem persists.
